title: Write the navigator image code s
description: Use function code #202 to set the navigator image code s corresponding to the screws . Note: first, set the coordinates of screws with function code #201. Then, set the navigator image code s corresponding to the screws with function code #20 2.

error_codes.1: Sequence ID — Exceeds the range of 1 to 500

notes: first, set the coordinates of screws with function code #201. Then, set the navigator image code s corresponding to the screws with function code #20 2. Handshake signal description: 1. Fill in the navigator image code s of up to 100 screws to 0xD2 - 0x135. Modbus (Hex) Function Description D2 Screw ID 1 - displayed image 0: no display 1: image A 2: image B 3: image C D3 Screw ID 2 - displayed image D4 Screw ID 3 - displayed image D5 Screw ID 4 - displayed image D6 Screw ID 5 - displayed image … Screw ID N - displayed image 131 Screw ID 96 - displayed image 132 Screw ID 97 - displayed image 133 Screw ID 98 - displayed image 134 Screw ID 99 - displayed image 135 Screw ID 100 - displayed image 2. Fill in the write request to 0xC8 - 0xCE. Modbus (Hex) Write / Read request Write C8 Function code 202 C9 Version number 0 CA Sequence ID 1 to 500 CB to CD Reserved - CE Request to send command 1 (to be filled in last ) 1. Fill in the navig ator image codes 0xD2 - 0x135 Completed Correct the written content according to the error code 2. Send request to write the navigator image codes 0xC8 - 0xCE 3. Wait for the return status 0xCF - 0xD1 OK NOK 3. Check whether the writing is successful from the return status in 0xCF - 0xD1. Modbus (Hex) Return status Description CF Function code 202 D0 Status 1: OK; 2: NOK D1 Error code - If successful, the read status (0xD0) is 1. If failed, the read status (0xD 0) is 2. The error codes are as follows: Code Error description Description 1 Sequence ID Exceeds the range of 1 to 500 2 Image code exceed s the range Exceeds the range of 0 to 3
